heading: Introduction
text: LightRAG is a graph-based RAG framework from HKUDS. It supports naive, local, global, hybrid, mix retrieval modes and stores entities in Neo4j as an option.
quote: LightRAG is a graph-based RAG framework from HKUDS.

heading: Self-Reflection
text: Self-RAG improves RAG by adding self-reflection over retrieved passages. Unlike CRAG, it learns reflection tokens. Both target retrieval quality, a core concept here.
quote: Self-RAG improves RAG by adding self-reflection over retrieved passages.

heading: Community Summaries
text: GraphRAG was proposed by Microsoft. It builds community summaries over a knowledge graph. LightRAG compares to GraphRAG and reduces token cost for multi-hop queries.
